mnemonics.title: Thread States
mnemonics.content: New Runners Bring Wine To Table: New, Runnable, Blocked, Waiting, Timed Waiting, Terminated

mnemonics.title: Thread Creation
mnemonics.content: RED: Run with Runnable, Extend Thread class, Dispatch with start()

mnemonics.title: Thread Priority
mnemonics.content: MIN Norm MAX: MIN_PRIORITY (1), NORM_PRIORITY (5), MAX_PRIORITY (10)
